MSL.Name: 48N6
MSL.Warhead: 143 kg / 320 lb HE fragmentation or Nuclear
MSL.Note: V denotes Nuclear, not in use anymore

MSL.Name: 48N6E
MSL.Warhead: 180 kg / 320 lb HE fragmentation or Nuclear
MSL.Note: V denotes Nuclear, not in use anymore

MSL.Name: 4K33 Osa-M
MSL.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

MSL.Name: 5V21 Angara
MSL.Type: Long range for medium to high targets

MSL.Name: 5V21P Wega
MSL.Type: Long range for medium to high targets

MSL.Name: 5V28 Vega-M
MSL.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
MSL.Note: N denotes Nuclear warhead

MSL.Name: 5V28E Vega-E
MSL.Type: Long range for medium to high targets

MSL.Name: 5V28MN Dubna
MSL.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
MSL.Note: N denotes Nuclear warhead

MSL.Name: 5V55R / V
MSL.Warhead: 133 kg / 293 lb HE fragmentation or Nuclear
MSL.Note: V denotes Nuclear, not in use anymore

MSL.Name: 5V55RUD
MSL.Warhead: 133 kg / 293 lb HE fragmentation or Nuclear
MSL.Note: V denotes Nuclear, not in use anymore

MSL.Name: 9M31 Strela-1 (Arrow)
MSL.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

MSL.Name: 9M311, 9M311K (3M87), 9M311-1
MSL.Warhead: 20 lbs / 9 kg Continuous-rod and steel cubes

MSL.Name: 9M311M (3M88)
MSL.Warhead: 20 lbs / 9 kg Continuous-rod and steel cubes

MSL.Name: 9M311M-M1
MSL.Warhead: 20 lbs / 9 kg Continuous-rod and steel cubes

MSL.Name: 9M31M Strela-1M (Arrow)
MSL.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

MSL.Name: 9M33 Osa
MSL.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

MSL.Name: 9M333 Strela-10M3 (Arrow)
MSL.Guidance: 9E425 three channel seeker, 1 infrared, 2 visible band television contrast, 3 passive homing
MSL.Type: Short range low alt Mobile SAM
MSL.Fuse: Laser proximity fuse with eight rather than four lobes

MSL.Name: 9M33M2 Osa-AK
MSL.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

MSL.Name: 9M33M3 Osa-AKM
MSL.Type: Short range low alt mobile SAM

MSL.Name: 9M37 Strela-10SV (Arrow)
MSL.Guidance: 9E47 Virazh two colour infrared/visible band seeker
MSL.RadarName: Snap Shot on every vehicle, Hat Box, Flat Box B
MSL.Type: Short range low alt Mobile SAM
MSL.Warhead: 6.6 lbs / 3 kg combined expanding rod and fragmentation

MSL.Name: 9M37M Strela-10M (Arrow)
MSL.Guidance: 9E47M seeker, Photo contrast or dual IR homing
MSL.Type: Short range low alt Mobile SAM
MSL.Warhead: 6.6 lbs / 3 kg combined expanding rod and fragmentation

MSL.Name: 9M37M2 Strela-10M2 (Arrow)
MSL.Guidance: 9E47M seeker, Photo contrast or dual IR homing
MSL.Type: Short range low alt Mobile SAM
MSL.Warhead: 6.6 lbs / 3 kg combined expanding rod and fragmentation

MSL.Name: 9M38
MSL.RadarName: Fire Dome on every vehicle, Snow Drift

MSL.Name: 9M38M1
MSL.RadarName: Fire Dome on every vehicle, Snow Drift

MSL.Name: 9M82
MSL.Guidance: Combined inertial with semi active self guidance
MSL.RadarName: Grill Pan, Bill Board, High Screen

MSL.Name: 9M83
MSL.Guidance: Combined inertial with semi active self guidance
MSL.RadarName: Grill Pan, Bill Board, High Screen

MSL.Name: Crotale (Rattlesnake)
MSL.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding

MSL.Name: Crotale NG (Rattlesnake)
MSL.Guidance: Command CLOS or optical direction finding

MSL.Name: FIM-92B Stinger POST
MSL.Note: Passive Optical Seeker Technique (POST), improved Stinger with a new seeker

MSL.Name: FIM-92C Stinger RMP
MSL.Note: Reprogrammable Microprocessor (RMP), allowing for incremental firmware updates

MSL.Name: FIM-92E Stinger Block I
MSL.Note: Improving the missile's performance against low-signature targets

MSL.Name: FIM-92F Stinger Block II
MSL.Note: Improve the missile's effectiveness in "high clutter"

MSL.Name: FT2000
MSL.RadarName: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird

MSL.Name: HQ-1
MSL.RadarName: Fan Song-B, Spoon Rest, Flat Face, Side Net

MSL.Name: HQ-10
MSL.RadarName: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird

MSL.Name: HQ-15
MSL.RadarName: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird

MSL.Name: HQ-18
MSL.Guidance: Combined inertial with semi active self guidance
MSL.RadarName: Grill Pan, Bill Board, High Screen

MSL.Name: HQ-2
MSL.RadarName: Fan Song-B, Spoon Rest, Flat Face, Side Net

MSL.Name: HQ-9
MSL.RadarName: Flap Lid B, Tombstone, Clam Shell, Big Bird

MSL.Name: Javelin
MSL.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

MSL.Name: MIM-104A Patriot
MSL.Note: Basic Capability vs. Aircraft. Limited Effectiveness/Lethality vs. Scud-Class TBMs And SOJ ECM Threats

MSL.Name: MIM-104C Patriot
MSL.Note: Improved TBM Capability

MSL.Name: MIM-104D Patriot
MSL.Note: Improved Acquisition, Guidance And Fusing. Improved Pk Against Low RCS, High Speed TBMs. Increased Defended Area And Lethality

MSL.Name: MIM-104F Patriot
MSL.Note: Improved Maneuverability. Hit To Kill System

MSL.Name: MIM-14A Nike
MSL.Warhead: 502kg / 1100lbs, blast-fragmentation or W-31 nuclear (2 kT, 40 kT)

MSL.Name: MIM-14B Nike
MSL.Warhead: 502kg / 1100lbs, blast-fragmentation or W-31 nuclear (2 kT, 40 kT)

MSL.Name: MIM-14C Nike
MSL.Warhead: 502kg / 1100lbs, blast-fragmentation or W-31 nuclear (2 kT, 40 kT)
MSL.Note: Improved missile guidance section for higher manoeuverability and better ECM resistance

MSL.Name: MIM-23A Basic Hawk
MSL.Stages: Boost phase and a sustain phase

MSL.Name: MIM-23B I-Hawk
MSL.Stages: Boost phase and a sustain phase
MSL.BoostTime: 5-second boost phase and a sustain phase of around 21 seconds
MSL.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
MSL.MaxRange: 40km / 25.0nm at High Alt, 20km / 12.4nm as Low Alt

MSL.Name: MIM-23C/D I-Hawk
MSL.Stages: Boost phase and a sustain phase
MSL.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
MSL.MaxRange: 40km / 25.0nm at High Alt, 20km / 12.4nm as Low Alt
MSL.Note: Improved ECCM capabilities

MSL.Name: MIM-23E/F I-Hawk
MSL.Stages: Boost phase and a sustain phase
MSL.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
MSL.MaxRange: 40km / 25.0nm at High Alt, 20km / 12.4nm as Low Alt
MSL.Note: Improved guidance for low level engagements in a high clutter/multi-jamming environment

MSL.Name: MIM-23G/H I-Hawk
MSL.Stages: Boost phase and a sustain phase
MSL.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
MSL.MaxRange: 40km / 25.0nm at High Alt, 20km / 12.4nm as Low Alt
MSL.Note: New body section assembly for the MIM-23E/F missiles

MSL.Name: MIM-23K/J I-Hawk
MSL.Stages: Boost phase and a sustain phase
MSL.MinRange: 1.5km / 5000ft at High Alt, 2.5km / 8200ft at Low Alt
MSL.Note: Enhanced lethality configuration warhead

MSL.Name: MIM-72A Chaparral
MSL.Note: Base on AIM-9D, Chaparral is a type of roadrunner bird

MSL.Name: MIM-72C Chaparral
MSL.Note: Base on AIM-9D, Chaparral is a type of roadrunner bird

MSL.Name: MIM-72E Chaparral
MSL.Note: Base on AIM-9D, Chaparral is a type of roadrunner bird

MSL.Name: MIM-72G Chaparral
MSL.Note: Sensor base on Stinger POST, Chaparral is a type of roadrunner bird

MSL.Name: Rapier Mk.1
MSL.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

MSL.Name: Rapier Mk.2
MSL.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

MSL.Name: RIM-24C Tartar
MSL.Note: TRIP (Tartar Reliability Improvement Program)

MSL.Name: RIM-2A Terrier
MSL.Warhead: 218 lbs / 99 kg controlled-fragmentation or 1kT W45 nuclear warhead
MSL.Note: Wing control, Subsonic targets only. SAM-N-7 BW-0

MSL.Name: RIM-2B Terrier
MSL.Warhead: 218 lbs / 99 kg controlled-fragmentation or 1kT W45 nuclear warhead
MSL.Note: Wing control, Subsonic targets only. SAM-N-7 BW-1

MSL.Name: RIM-2C Terrier
MSL.Warhead: 218 lbs / 99 kg controlled-fragmentation or 1kT W45 nuclear warhead
MSL.Note: Tail control, Supersonic targets. SAM-N-7 BT-3

MSL.Name: RIM-2D Terrier
MSL.Warhead: 218 lbs / 99 kg controlled-fragmentation or 1kT W45 nuclear warhead
MSL.Note: Tail control, Supersonic targets. SAM-N-7 BT-3/A

MSL.Name: RIM-2E Terrier
MSL.Warhead: 218 lbs / 99 kg controlled-fragmentation or 1kT W45 nuclear warhead
MSL.Note: Introduced semi-active homing, Tail control, Supersonic targets. SAM-N-7 HT-3

MSL.Name: RIM-2F Terrier
MSL.Warhead: 218 lbs / 99 kg controlled-fragmentation or 1kT W45 nuclear warhead
MSL.Note: New rocket motor, Tail control, Supersonic targets. SAM-N-7 HT-3

MSL.Name: RIM-66A SM-1MR
MSL.Previous: RIM-2 Terrier, RIM-8 Talos, RIM-24C Tartar
MSL.Note: MR = Medium Range

MSL.Name: RIM-66B SM-1MR
MSL.Note: MR = Medium Range

MSL.Name: RIM-66C/D SM-2MR
MSL.Guidance: Monopulse semi-active radar homing. Inertial/command mid-course guidance
MSL.Previous: RIM-2 Terrier, RIM-8 Talos, RIM-24C Tartar
MSL.Note: Home On Jam (HOJ). MR = Medium Range

MSL.Name: RIM-66E SM-1MR
MSL.Note: Retired USN 2003. MR = Medium Range

MSL.Name: RIM-66G/H/J SM-2MR
MSL.Guidance: Monopulse semi-active radar homing. Inertial/command mid-course guidance
MSL.Note: Home On Jam (HOJ). MR = Medium Range

MSL.Name: RIM-66K/L/M SM-2MR
MSL.Guidance: Monopulse semi-active radar homing. Inertial/command mid-course guidance
MSL.Note: Home On Jam (HOJ). MR = Medium Range

MSL.Name: RIM-67A SM-1ER
MSL.Stages: 2, MK 30 solid-fuel sustainer motor, Hercules MK 12 booster.
MSL.Note: Too big for VLS. ER = Extended Range

MSL.Name: RIM-67B SM-2ER
MSL.Stages: 2, MK 30 solid-fuel sustainer motor, Hercules MK 12 booster.
MSL.Note: Too big for VLS. ER = Extended Range

MSL.Name: RIM-67C SM-2ER
MSL.Stages: 2, MK 30 solid-fuel sustainer motor, Hercules MK 70 booster.
MSL.Note: Too big for VLS. ER = Extended Range

MSL.Name: RIM-67D SM-2ER
MSL.Stages: 2, MK 30 Mod 4 solid-fuel sustainer motor, Hercules MK 70 booster.
MSL.Fuse: MK 45 MOD 8 proximity fuze. TDD (Target Detecting Device).
MSL.Note: Too big for VLS. ER = Extended Range

MSL.Name: Roland 1
MSL.Guidance: Optical, Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

MSL.Name: Roland 2
MSL.Guidance: Semi Automatic to Line Of Sight (SACLOS)

MSL.Name: Tayir as Sabah
MSL.RadarName: Fan Song-B, Spoon Rest, Flat Face, Side Net

MSL.Name: V-750VN / 13D Desna
MSL.Note: Shot Down Gary Powers U2

MSL.Name: V-870 Vega
MSL.Type: Long range for medium to high targets
